title: CO-OWNERSHIP OF MINERAL RIGHTS
doc_html:
PART 2.  CO-OWNERSHIP OF MINERAL RIGHTS

SUBPART A.  WHEN CO-OWNERSHIP EXISTS

§168.  Mineral rights susceptible of undivided ownership

Mineral rights are susceptible of ownership in indivision.  

Acts 1974, No. 50, §168, eff. Jan. 1, 1975.
